case_title: ARCHIE WILLIAMS VS. KAY STERN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ARCHIE AS TO DEFENDANT STERN, KAY DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-31-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-20-2003
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ARCHIE SERVED DEC-09-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STERN, KAY

PROOF OF SERVICE OF CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, NOTICE TO PLTF; ADR INFORMATION SHEET; STIPULATION TO COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ARCHIE SERVED DEC-10-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT STERN, KAY
DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ARCHIE
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT STERN, KAY
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-31-2003. MAR-07-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DAVID BERNARD LYNCH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-01-2003 THROUGH JUN-30-2003.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, DAVID B. LYNCH TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE ON JUNE 10, 2003 @ 10:00 A.M. IN MY OFFICE AT 505 MONTGOMERY ST. 7TH FLOOR SF
FAX FROM ARBITRATOR, DAVID B. LYNCH TO ARBITRATION DEPT.; IN RE: UNABLE TO SERVE/OUT OF THE COUNTRY PASS JULY
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE AUG-05-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT DANIEL HUBER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-09-2003 THROUGH SEP-07-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-07-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR ROBERT D. HUBER

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT STERN, KAY RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ARCHIE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ARCHIE WILLIAMS IS DENIED SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-07-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-05-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
